FIELD — Local channels
Detect your region to suggest channels in your area? Privacy policy

Privacy Policy

Last updated May 2026

FIELD is a personal sports intelligence tool. Here is what it does and doesn't do with your data.

What we collect

1. Your region (optional). If you allow it, FIELD uses your IP address to detect your city and timezone via ipapi.co — not FIELD's servers. This helps suggest local channels. You can disable this anytime in Settings.

2. Your preferences. Settings (timezone, sports filters, teams, display mode) are stored in your browser's local storage. This data never leaves your device.

3. Push notifications (optional). If you subscribe to game alerts, FIELD stores a push subscription endpoint — a technical address generated by your browser — in Cloudflare's infrastructure. No personal identifying information is stored. All notification content is encrypted end-to-end. Unsubscribe anytime via Settings.

What we don't do

No advertising. No affiliate deals. No user accounts. No tracking pixels. No analytics services. No data sold to third parties. No financial relationship with any broadcaster, streaming service, or sportsbook.

When FIELD says "this game is free on antenna" or "no cheap option tonight," there is no hidden incentive behind that advice.

Your rights

You control your data: Settings → Privacy for location, Settings → Notifications to unsubscribe, or clear all data in browser settings. EU/UK users have full GDPR rights — your preferences are on-device, push data is deletable via unsubscribe.

Data processing

Push notification data is processed by Cloudflare, Inc. under their standard Data Processing Addendum.

🔔 Get alerts when games get dramatic?
FIELD stores a technical endpoint (no personal info) in Cloudflare to deliver notifications. You can unsubscribe anytime in Settings. Privacy policy

Betting Intelligence
Lines sourced from The Odds API. For entertainment purposes only. Verify current lines before wagering. Must be 21+ and in eligible state. Sports betting may be illegal in your jurisdiction. Problem gambling: 1-800-GAMBLER.
